'''鈭歝h-m-g-b''' ('''kachamgeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loft|loft]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loft|loft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-m-g-b
|-
! Lemma
| kachamgeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichamgeboko|thichamgeboko]] || [[word:jichamgeboko|jichamgeboko]] || [[word:shichamgeboko|shichamgeboko]] || [[word:kichamgeboko|kichamgeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchamgeboko|thuthuchamgeboko]] || [[word:jujuchamgeboko|jujuchamgeboko]] || [[word:shushuchamgeboko|shushuchamgeboko]] || [[word:kukuchamgeboko|kukuchamgeboko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchamgeboko|thuchamgeboko]] || [[word:juchamgeboko|juchamgeboko]] || [[word:shuchamgeboko|shuchamgeboko]] || [[word:kuchamgeboko|kuchamgeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochamgeboko|thochamgeboko]] || [[word:jochamgeboko|jochamgeboko]] || [[word:shochamgeboko|shochamgeboko]] || [[word:kochamgeboko|kochamgeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chamgeboko|th忙chamgeboko]] || [[word:j忙chamgeboko|j忙chamgeboko]] || [[word:sh忙chamgeboko|sh忙chamgeboko]] || [[word:k忙chamgeboko|k忙chamgeboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachamgeboko|thachamgeboko]] || [[word:jachamgeboko|jachamgeboko]] || [[word:shachamgeboko|shachamgeboko]] || [[word:kachamgeboko|kachamgeboko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
